settings.title: What Size Tumbler Is It Compatible With?
settings.custom_code: <iframe width="315" height="560" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/ulVieEb0e9A?feature=share" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
settings.content: Tumbler Buddy is compatible with any standard size20ozTumbler!

settings.title: What Size Bottles/Cans Can The Tumbler Buddy hold?
settings.custom_code: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/dweBMqviRTg?si=Z4B-y_XULOfHaxii" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
settings.content: Tumbler Buddy allows your 20oz Tumbler to act as a beverage insulator to hold 12oz Cans/Skinny Cans/Bottles/Stubby Bottles and 16oz cans.

settings.title: What Comes With The Purchase Of The Tumbler Buddy?
settings.custom_code: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/dweBMqviRTg?si=Uyi4pXMqahwMfMt3" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
settings.content: What comes with the Tumbler Buddy is the Tumbler converter insert and the Tumbler compression top lid!

settings.title: How Long Does It Keep The Drinks Cold For?
settings.custom_code: <iframe width="315" height="560" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/mSy9j6Pntg0?feature=share" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
settings.content: Tumbler Buddy allows your drinks to stay as cold as the ice you normally would place in your Tumbler. 12+ hours! You now don’t have to worry about your drinks getting warm, or watered down due to the ice cubes!

settings.title: How Long Should You Keep The Tumbler Buddy Insert In The Freezer for?
settings.content: We recommend to keep the Tumbler Buddy in the freezer for at least 2 hours prior to use to turn the freeze gel frozen solid, however it will still help keep your drinks cold due to the tumblers double insulated walls it is placed in without adding to the freezer.
